narrative:
Worth 1-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 486 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
